hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.js|*.ts|*.jsx|*.tsx|*.py|*.rs|*.go|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in */src/index.*) echo 'REMINDER: Public barrel edited. Update .claude/docs/api-surface.md if exports changed.' ;; esac; exit 0

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'npm publish'*|*'yarn publish'*|*'pnpm publish'*|*'twine upload'*|*'cargo publish'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Package publish must be done by CI on tag push, not by Claude.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push'*|*'git commit'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Git commit/push should be done by the SRE agent or a human.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; exit 0
